overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beach. The scene features a stormy sky, an amusement park with a lit ferris wheel in the background, and two parked cars with headlights on where NPCs are gathered. The camera moves from a waterfront promenade past the vehicles and toward the amusement park along the sandy shore.

tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky along the waterfront
calm ocean water reflecting distant city lights

large illuminated ferris wheel visible in the far distance at the amusement park

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a waterfront promenade at night, with a modern glass building on the right and the ocean on the left. Palm trees line the path, and the distant lights of an amusement park are visible across the sand. A pedestrian crosses the path from left to right, briefly obscuring the view.

slowing approach toward two parked cars with headlights illuminated

standing near the second vehicle observing the surroundings

dark SUV with headlights on, parked behind the sedan

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from pavement to sandy beach as the camera approaches two parked black vehicles with their headlights on. Several game characters stand around the cars, and the amusement park structures become more prominent in the background against the dark cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera curves around the parked vehicles, revealing a prominent blue neon 'LOS SANTOS' sign on the building behind the beach. The amusement park ferris wheel glows in the background while the camera explores the area around the cars and the NPCs standing nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline approaching amusement park

events.description: leaving the car area behind and walking toward the open shoreline
turning slightly toward the water while continuing along the beach

ocean waves lapping at the shore in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: Leaving the vehicles behind, the camera walks along the open beach toward the amusement park. The ferris wheel and roller coaster structures dominate the right side of the frame, while waves lap at the rocky shoreline on the left. The scene is devoid of other people, creating a solitary atmosphere as the camera approaches the lit amusement park rides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured waterfront promenade toward the glowing lights of a distant amusement park along a dark, stormy beach. It begins on a paved path lined with palm trees and a modern glass building, where a passing pedestrian briefly crosses the frame. As the camera moves from the pavement onto the sand, the scene shifts toward two parked black vehicles with their headlights cutting through the night, surrounded by a small group of people. The camera then curves around these cars to reveal a bright blue neon Los Santos sign before leaving the group behind to venture further across the open shore. Finally, the perspective opens up to the rocky shoreline and crashing waves, moving in solitude toward the towering, illuminated structures of the ferris wheel and roller coaster.
